description: Abstract base entity with audit fields (id, created_at, updated_at). All domain models extend this class.
acceptance_criteria: All models inherit from BaseEntity; id auto-increments; created_at/updated_at auto-managed; 'python -m alembic revision --autogenerate' detects new models

description: User, Role, and Permission entities for RBAC (7 roles: AGENT, UNDERWRITER, CLAIMS_ADJUSTER, FINANCE_MANAGER, RECOVERY_MANAGER, ADMIN, AUDITOR)
acceptance_criteria: User links to roles (many-to-many); Role links to permissions; password_hash encrypted; user can be created/read/updated; bcrypt strength ≥ 10

description: Insured (Party) entity with personal/organization details (first_name, last_name, ssn_tin, email, phone, address, dob, org_name)
acceptance_criteria: ssn_tin encrypted in database; all address fields present; can be created/searched by name/ssn; relationship to Policy works

description: Policy, Coverage, and Premium entities. Policy has status enum (QUOTED, BOUND, ISSUED, ACTIVE, CANCELLED, EXPIRED). Coverage has limit/deductible. Premium has calculation factors.
acceptance_criteria: Policy auto-generates POL-YYYY-NNNNNN format; Coverage limits ≤ policy aggregate; Premium calculation stored; all relationships work; indexes on policy_number, status

description: Claim, ClaimAdjustment, and ReserveLine entities. Claim has status enum (FNOL, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, DENIED, SETTLED, CLOSED, REOPENED). Reserve breakdown by type (MEDICAL, PROPERTY_DAMAGE, LIABILITY, SUBROGATION).
acceptance_criteria: Claim auto-generates CLM-YYYY-NNNNNN format; Claim links to Policy; ClaimAdjustment tracks before/after values; ReserveLine tracks balance; indexes on claim_number, status, policy_id

description: Payment, Payee, and PaymentMethod entities. Payment types: SETTLEMENT, REIMBURSEMENT, DISBURSEMENT, REVERSAL, REISSUE, VOID. Payee status: PENDING_VERIFICATION, VERIFIED, BLOCKED. PaymentMethod types: ACH, WIRE, CARD, STRIPE_CONNECT, GLOBAL_PAYOUTS.
acceptance_criteria: Payment amount stored as Decimal; Payee.tax_id encrypted; PaymentMethod.account_number encrypted; status enums enforced; indexes on payee_id, status, claim_id

description: Endorsement, Subrogation, ScheduledPayment entities. Endorsement types: ADD_COVERAGE, REMOVE_COVERAGE, CHANGE_LIMIT, INCREASE_LIMIT, DECREASE_LIMIT. Subrogation status: IDENTIFIED, REFERRED, PENDING, SETTLED, CLOSED. ScheduledPayment tracks payment schedule.
acceptance_criteria: Endorsement auto-generates END-YYYY-NNNNNN format; premium_change stored as Decimal; ScheduledPayment tracks current_due_date, balance_remaining; all relationships to Claim work

description: AuditLog immutable entity. Tracks all actions: user_id, user_role, action (CREATE, UPDATE, APPROVE, PROCESS, REVERSE, VOID, DENY), entity_type, entity_id, before_values, after_values (JSON), ip_address, timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: AuditLog is immutable (no update/delete); PII masked in before/after values; indexes on timestamp, entity_type, entity_id, user_id; retention enforced by app (7 years)

description: Alembic database migrations. Initial migration creates all tables, indexes, constraints, and audit triggers.
acceptance_criteria: 'python -m alembic upgrade head' successfully creates schema; 'python -m alembic downgrade -1' reverses schema; migration history tracked; no manual SQL required

description: BaseRepository with generic CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, find_all, find_by). All repositories inherit from this.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD operations return entities; find_by returns list; pagination support (offset, limit); methods are type-hinted; session management via dependency injection

description: PolicyRepository with search, find_by_number, find_by_insured, find_by_status. Supports complex filters (policy_type, effective_date range, status).
acceptance_criteria: search() returns paginated results; find_by_number() returns single Policy or None; filters indexed; response time < 100ms for typical queries

description: ClaimRepository with search, find_by_policy, find_by_status. Supports filtering by claim number, date_of_loss range, status.
acceptance_criteria: search() returns paginated results sorted by date_of_loss DESC; find_by_policy() returns all claims for policy; find_by_status() returns claims with specific status

description: PaymentRepository with find_pending_approval, find_by_status, find_by_claim. Supports filtering by payment method, status, date range.
acceptance_criteria: find_pending_approval() returns payments with status=PENDING_APPROVAL sorted by created_at; find_by_claim() returns all payments for claim

description: PayeeRepository with find_by_tax_id, find_unverified, find_by_status. Supports searching by legal_name, payee_type.
acceptance_criteria: find_by_tax_id() returns Payee or None; find_unverified() returns payees with status=PENDING_VERIFICATION; all tax_id lookups encrypted/decrypted correctly

description: UserRepository for RBAC. find_by_email, find_by_role, find_permissions. Supports role/permission lookups.
acceptance_criteria: find_by_email() returns User or None; find_by_role(role_name) returns users with that role; find_permissions(user_id) returns list of permission strings

description: AuditLogRepository with search, filter by date range/entity type/user. Immutable (no update/delete on repository).
acceptance_criteria: search() returns paginated audit logs; filters work: date_range, entity_type, entity_id, user_id, action; indexes used for performance; no update/delete methods exposed

description: Authentication endpoints: POST /register (create user), POST /login (generate JWT). Validates credentials, returns access_token, optional refresh_token.
acceptance_criteria: POST /register validates email/password, creates user, returns 201 + JWT; POST /login validates credentials, returns 200 + JWT; password hashing via bcrypt; JWT contains sub, email, role, permissions

description: Policy endpoints: GET /policies (search), GET /policies/{id} (detail), POST /policies (create), PUT /policies/{id} (update), POST /policies/{id}/endorsements (create endorsement).
acceptance_criteria: GET /policies supports filters: policy_number, insured_name, status, policy_type, effective_date_from, effective_date_to; returns paginated PolicyResponse; response time < 3s

description: Claim endpoints: GET /claims (search), GET /claims/{id} (detail), POST /claims (FNOL), PUT /claims/{id} (update), PUT /claims/{id}/reopen (reopen claim).
acceptance_criteria: GET /claims supports filters: claim_number, status, date_of_loss_from, date_of_loss_to, policy_id; returns paginated ClaimResponse sorted by date_of_loss DESC

description: Payment endpoints: POST /payments (create), GET /payments (list), GET /payments/{id} (detail), PUT /payments/{id}/approve (approve), PUT /payments/{id}/reverse (reverse), PUT /payments/{id}/void (void).
acceptance_criteria: POST /payments validates payee verified, payment ≤ settlement; GET /payments filters by status, claim_id, payee_id; PUT .../approve enforces FINANCE_MANAGER role; response statuses: 201/200/400/403/422

description: Payee endpoints: GET /payees (list), POST /payees (onboard), GET /payees/{id} (detail), PUT /payees/{id} (update), POST /payees/{id}/kyc-verify (verify).
acceptance_criteria: POST /payees creates payee with status=PENDING_VERIFICATION; POST .../kyc-verify validates tax_id, updates status to VERIFIED; GET /payees filters by status, payee_type

description: Health check endpoints: GET /health/live (liveness), GET /health/ready (readiness with DB/Redis checks).
acceptance_criteria: /health/live returns 200 + {status: alive}; /health/ready returns 200 if DB + Redis healthy, 503 if either unhealthy; no auth required

description: Audit endpoints: GET /audit-logs (search). Filters by date_range, user_id, entity_type, action. AUDITOR/ADMIN role required.
acceptance_criteria: GET /audit-logs enforces role-based access; supports pagination, sorting; PII masked in responses; response time < 5s for 1000 records

description: Admin endpoints: payment method configuration, routing rules, user role management. ADMIN role required.
acceptance_criteria: POST /admin/payment-methods (config ACH, Wire, Stripe, Global Payouts); POST /admin/routing-rules (config rules); PUT /admin/users/{id}/role (assign role); all enforced by role check

description: Pydantic DTOs for all endpoints. Includes auth, policy, claim, payment, payee, common (error, pagination, health) schemas.
acceptance_criteria: All DTOs use Pydantic v2; validation rules enforced (EmailStr, Decimal as string, enums); auto-generated OpenAPI docs via FastAPI; requests validated before service layer

description: Global exception handler. Catches custom exceptions, maps to HTTP status codes, returns standardized ErrorResponse with masked PII.
acceptance_criteria: All exceptions caught; HTTP 400/401/403/404/422/500 mapped correctly; error response includes status, error, message, details, timestamp, correlation_id; PII masked

description: PolicyService with business logic: create_policy, update_policy, endorse_policy, renew_policy, cancel_policy. Validates business rules (effective_date ≥ today, coverage limits, etc.).
acceptance_criteria: create_policy validates all rules and generates POL-YYYY-NNNNNN; endorse_policy pro-rata adjusts premium; cancel_policy calculates refund; audit logging on all actions

description: ClaimService with business logic: file_fnol, investigate_claim, approve_claim, deny_claim, settle_claim, reopen_claim. Validates coverage applicability, deductible calculations.
acceptance_criteria: file_fnol generates CLM-YYYY-NNNNNN, verifies policy active on date_of_loss; approve_claim calculates settlement = reserve - deductible; deny_claim requires reason_code; audit logging on all actions

description: PaymentService with business logic: create_payment, approve_payment, process_payment (async), reverse_payment, void_payment. Allocates to reserves, validates amount ≤ settlement.
acceptance_criteria: create_payment validates payee verified, amount ≤ settlement; approve_payment enqueues async task; process_payment calls payment processor (Stripe/ACH/Wire); handles reversals with reserve restoration

description: PayeeService with business logic: onboard_payee, verify_kyc, add_payment_method. Validates tax_id, bank account, creates KYC verification record.
acceptance_criteria: onboard_payee creates payee with status=PENDING_VERIFICATION; verify_kyc validates tax_id format, updates status; add_payment_method encrypts account_number; audit logging

description: Premium calculation engine. Implements formula: Base × Territory × Age × Claims - Discounts + Surcharges. Minimum $100. Results stored in Premium entity.
acceptance_criteria: calculate_premium returns Decimal ≥ 100; correctly applies factors (territory 1.0-2.0, age 0.8-1.5, claims 1.0-1.5); discounts applied correctly; stored for audit trail

description: Reserve management service. allocate_payment, update_reserve_balance, track_payments_by_line. Handles eroding vs non-eroding allocations.
acceptance_criteria: allocate_payment splits payment across reserve lines (sum allocations = payment); eroding reduces balance, non-eroding doesn't; balance tracking accurate; audit logging

description: Audit logging service. log_action(user, action, entity_type, entity_id, before, after). Masks PII in logs. Immutable storage.
acceptance_criteria: log_action creates AuditLog record; PII masked (SSN XXX-XX-1234, account ****7890); before/after stored as JSON; no update/delete on logs; retention enforced (7 years)

description: RBAC service. check_permission(user_id, permission), assign_role(user_id, role), get_user_permissions(user_id). Enforces 7 roles.
acceptance_criteria: check_permission returns bool; assign_role updates user's roles; get_user_permissions returns list of permission strings; all operations logged to audit trail

description: JWT authentication module. generate_token, verify_token, hash_password, verify_password. Uses bcrypt (strength 10). Token includes sub, email, role, permissions.
acceptance_criteria: generate_token returns valid JWT with configurable expiration; verify_token validates signature/expiration; bcrypt strength ≥ 10; password validation timing-safe

description: Middleware for correlation ID tracking. Extracts X-Correlation-Id header or generates UUID. Includes in all logs and response headers.
acceptance_criteria: Generates UUID per request if header missing; adds to MDC for logging; returns in response; propagated to async tasks; all logs include correlation_id

description: Custom exception hierarchy. AppException base class. ValidationException (400), AuthenticationException (401), AuthorizationException (403), NotFoundException (404), ConflictException (409), UnprocessableEntityException (422), InternalServerError (500).
acceptance_criteria: All exceptions inherit from AppException; HTTP status codes mapped correctly; business logic raises specific exception types; global handler catches and converts to ErrorResponse

description: Pydantic Settings for configuration. DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, JWT_EXPIRATION, CORS_ORIGINS, LOG_LEVEL, REDIS_URL. Loads from environment variables. Validates required fields.
acceptance_criteria: Settings loads from .env (dev) or environment (prod); JWT_SECRET required and min 32 chars; defaults for optional fields; validation errors on startup if required field missing

description: SQLAlchemy engine, session factory, get_db dependency. Configures connection pooling, SSL/TLS (prod).
acceptance_criteria: Engine created from DATABASE_URL; session factory uses pool; get_db() is FastAPI dependency; connection pooling configured; SSL enforced in prod

description: FastAPI application entry point. Initializes app, middleware, routers, error handlers. Configures CORS, OpenAPI.
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app() created; all routers registered; middleware added (logging, correlation ID); CORS configured via settings; OpenAPI docs at /docs, /redoc; health checks registered

description: Integration modules for external payment systems. stripe_service.py, global_payouts.py, ach_wire_service.py. Includes retry logic, circuit breaker pattern, error handling.
acceptance_criteria: Each service wraps processor API; exponential backoff on failure (3 attempts); circuit breaker on 5 consecutive failures; error responses parsed and mapped to domain exceptions

description: Xactimate/XactAnalysis estimate parser. Parses JSON/XML, extracts line items (description, quantity, unit_price, total_amount).
acceptance_criteria: Parses Xactimate JSON/XML format; validates schema; extracts line items; supports CPT/ICD mappings; returns line item list; handles parsing errors gracefully

description: Tax ID validation, document management, accounting system integrations. tax_id_verifier.py, document_mgmt.py, accounting_system.py.
acceptance_criteria: tax_id_verifier validates SSN/EIN format and IRS lookup; document_mgmt uploads/retrieves encrypted documents; accounting_system posts journal entries; all with retry logic

description: Celery async tasks. payment_processing_task (process approved payments), notification_tasks (send emails), integration_tasks (external API calls).
acceptance_criteria: Celery tasks @app.task decorated; payment_processing_task enqueued after payment approval; tasks log with correlation_id; error handling with retry; notifications on completion

description: PII encryption utilities. encrypt_aes256, decrypt_aes256 for SSN, tax_id, account_number. Uses KMS key or environment variable key.
acceptance_criteria: AES-256 encryption/decryption working; encrypted data stored in database; keys managed via environment variables (KMS in prod); all sensitive fields encrypted at rest

description: PII masking utilities. mask_ssn, mask_account, mask_email for display and logging.
acceptance_criteria: mask_ssn(123456789) returns XXX-XX-6789; mask_account(1234567890123456) returns ****3456; mask_email(user@example.com) returns u***@example.com; used in audit logs and error responses

description: Business rule validators. validate_coverage_limit, validate_deductible, validate_payment_amount, validate_policy_dates, etc.
acceptance_criteria: Validators return bool or raise ValidationException; used by service layer before database writes; coverage_limit ≤ policy_aggregate, deductible ≤ limit, effective_date ≥ today

description: Python dependencies with pinned versions. Includes FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, Celery, Redis, structlog, bcrypt, alembic, uvicorn, gunicorn.
acceptance_criteria: 'pip install -r requirements.txt' successful; all versions pinned; dev dependencies in separate requirements-dev.txt; production ready versions used

description: Pytest configuration and fixtures. Includes database fixture (SQLite in-memory), auth fixture (JWT tokens), mock external services.
acceptance_criteria: Fixtures configured for all test types (unit, integration, e2e); database fixtures provide isolated transactions; auth fixtures generate valid/invalid tokens
